programs.title: The Perfect Soulmate
programs.desc: Sarah Miles, desperate to escape her abusive husband, reaches out to a new friend she meets online, only to discover he’s an even more dangerous companion.

programs.title: A Summer to Remember
programs.desc: ER doc Jessica loves her job, but not the hours. Meeting Trevor in Fiji, Jessica also strikes up a friendship with Will, co-owner of their resort. As Jessica notices how Trevor is a workaholic, she also sees that Will offers tranquility.

programs.title: Paper Tiger
programs.desc: A somewhat prim and proper Englishman is hired as the tutor to the son of the Japanese ambassador. His life changes when he and the boy are kidnapped by terrorists for political purposes.

programs.title: Angel and the Badman
programs.desc: Quirt Evans, an all round bad guy, is nursed back to health and sought after by Penelope Worth, a Quaker girl. He eventually finds himself having to choose between his world and the world Penelope lives in.

programs.title: Goddess
programs.desc: Elspeth Dickens dreams of finding her

programs.title: A Sister's Obsession
programs.desc: Kendra’s life couldn’t be more perfect – she has a loving husband, supportive best friend, and a blossoming career… and she was just awarded the title of Educator of the Year. But when Kendra stands up to deliver a speech at the awards banquet held in her honour, her life quickly starts to unravel.
